displayTitle: The Art of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
synopsis: The Art of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order is a reference book written by Aaron Contreras, with a foreword by Jordan Lamarre-Wan. It features annotated concept art from the production of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order, a canon video game. The book was published by Dark Horse Books on November 19, 2019. A limited edition was also published, which includes an exclusive cover and lithograph.
title: The Art of Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
